CustomField.description: Page count of this document's core text, excluding citations and appendices per FRA 42 U.S.C. 4336a. For files where nepa_is_appendix__c = false, this rolls up to the FRA compliance report. Populated manually by the uploader or automatically by an Apex PDFPageCount action on insert.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Page count of core document text only. Do not include appendix or citation pages — those are excluded from FRA page limits.
CustomField.label: Page Count
